//: Claude Desktop: Settings -> Developer -> Edit Config opens claude_desktop_config.json. Paste this `mcpServers` block (merge if you already have one) and fully restart Claude Desktop.
//clone: Clone Starling-MCP and run `npm install` first (the prepare script builds to dist/). Then replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/Starling-MCP below with wherever YOU cloned it — `args` must point at that clone's dist/bin/starling-mcp.js.
//node: Claude Desktop does NOT bundle Node. You need Node 20+ on your PATH or `node` won't be found. Run `node -v` in a terminal first; if missing, install from nodejs.org. On macOS, GUI apps sometimes don't inherit your shell PATH — if `node` isn't found, replace "node" with the absolute path printed by `which node`.
